content:
MODULE: cosmos.cicd.pipeline_manager
FILE: cosmos/cicd/pipeline_manager.py (835 lines)
CATEGORY: cicd

DESCRIPTION: cosmos CI/CD Pipeline Manager

"I've automated the automation! It's automation all the way down!"

Unified pipeline management across multiple CI/CD platforms.

CLASSES:
- PipelineStatus(Enum): Pipeline execution status.
- PipelineTrigger(Enum): Pipeline trigger types.
- PipelineStep: Individual step in a pipeline job.
- PipelineJob: Job containing multiple steps.
- Pipeline: Pipeline definition.
  Methods: def to_github_actions(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def to_gitlab_ci(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- PipelineRun: Pipeline execution instance.
  Methods: def duration(self) -> Optional[timedelta]
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- CICDProvider(ABC): Abstract base class for CI/CD providers.
  Methods: async def list_pipelines(self, repository: str) -> List[Pipeline]
  Methods: async def get_pipeline(self, pipeline_id: str) -> Optional[Pipeline]
  Methods: async def create_pipeline(self, pipeline: Pipeline) -> bool
  Methods: async def update_pipeline(self, pipeline: Pipeline) -> bool
  Methods: async def delete_pipeline(self, pipeline_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def trigger_pipeline(self, pipeline_id: str, branch: str='main', variables: Dict[str, str]=Non
  Methods: async def get_run(self, run_id: str) -> Optional[PipelineRun]
  Methods: async def list_runs(self, pipeline_id: str, limit: int=20) -> List[PipelineRun]
- PipelineManager: Unified CI/CD pipeline management across providers.

Features:
- Multi-provider 
  Methods: def register_provider(self, name: str, provider: CICDProvider)
  Methods: def get_provider(self, name: str) -> Optional[CICDProvider]
  Methods: async def create_pipeline(self, provider: str, pipeline: Pipeline) -> bool
  Methods: async def create_from_template(self, provider: str, template_id: str, repository: str, name: str=Non
  Methods: async def update_pipeline(self, provider: str, pipeline: Pipeline) -> bool
  Methods: async def delete_pipeline(self, provider: str, pipeline_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def trigger(self, provider: str, pipeline_id: str, branch: str='main', variables: Dict[str, st
  Methods: async def cancel(self, provider: str, run_id: str) -> bool
